final:
module top_module(input [7:0] x, b,
            output [7:0] c, d, e, f, g, h, i, j, k);assign c = x & b;               
    assign d = x | b;               
    assign e = x ^ b;               
    assign f = ~x;                  
    assign g = {x[3:0], b[3:0]};    
    assign h = x >> 3;              
    assign i = &b;                  
    assign j = (x > b) ? x : b;     
    assign k = x - b;               
endmodule
